lastReleaseMessage: finish handler + branding reconcile: add data/symbols, data/rune-meanings.json, data/textures rows to CLAUDE.md; README display name Yes& Apothecary; drop PROJECT_SPEC 4.10 (category-defaults deleted in v0.17.0); remove orphaned categories.js + category-defaults.js

barRaise.topFinding: Steady at needs-attention, but with a new wrinkle: the working tree is dirty for the first time in three runs, and the diff is real progress sitting unshipped. PROJECT_SPEC.md, .project-context.json, and scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1 carry uncommitted edits that close yesterday's top action: the section 4.4 symbol schema is rewritten to the PNG registry, section 4.9 (rune-meanings) and 4.8 (textures) schemas are added, the dashboard writer gains corruption-recovery plus repo-derived metrics, and .project-context jumps to schema 1.1. None of it is committed or released, so the fix is not on the live site and the work queue has not reconciled. Two of the four canonical-audit drifts the tree set out to fix are still open even in the working copy: section 2 still calls the look 'all SVG and webfonts' and section 8 still lacks the v0.8.2 PNG-only locked decision. The label engine itself stays healthy (no renderer, state, schema, or palette finding above LOW for the fourth run running); every MEDIUM remains in the docs, dashboard, and repo-hygiene perimeter.
